retrieved_result: Ajo Arizona (AZ 85321) Fact Sheet "Ajo Arizona (AZ 85321) Fact Sheet The current location of Ajo, Arizona was founded by the New Cornelia Copper Company, a subsidiary of Calumet and Arizona Mining Company, in about 1915. The company owned town was established to house the workers at the adjacent open pit copper mine. Phelps Dodge ac
